title: Office Closures Extended to May 31, 2020
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) will remain closed to public access through May 31, 2020. According to CEO Charles E. Fagerstrom, “The extension of the public office closure supports ongoing social distancing and wellness of our employees, Shareholders, customers, and partners during this COVID-19 pandemic. We are planning to reopen our SNC Nome and Anchorage corporate offices on June 1st with new health and safety measures in accordance with guidance issued by Feder...
